sas.output:
# Automatically translated Python / Pandas / Snowflake output
import pandas as pd

def assess_risk(client_db_df: pd.DataFrame, client_id: int, score: float) -> pd.DataFrame:
    # Set risk criteria matching legacy algorithm
    raw_multiplier = score * 1.45
    status = 'HIGH' if raw_multiplier > 80 else 'LOW'
    
    # Filter and update target structure
    risk_assessment = client_db_df[client_db_df['client_id'] == client_id].copy()
    risk_assessment['raw_multiplier'] = raw_multiplier
    risk_assessment['risk_status'] = status
    
    return risk_assessment

pick.input:
* Legacy PICK BASIC Universe code
001 SUBROUTINE INV_CALC(ITEM.ID, PRICE, QTY, TOTAL)
002 FILE = 'WAREHOUSE_STOCK'
003 OPEN FILE TO F.STOCK ELSE ABORT
004 READ RECORD FROM F.STOCK, ITEM.ID ELSE RECORD = ''
005 IF RECORD<4> > QTY THEN
006   TOTAL = RECORD<5> * QTY
007   RECORD<4> = RECORD<4> - QTY
008   WRITE RECORD TO F.STOCK, ITEM.ID
009 END ELSE
010   TOTAL = 0
011 END
012 RETURN

fortran.input:
C      LEGACY FORTRAN CLAIMS AUDITING SCHEMAS
       SUBROUTINE AUDIT_CLAIM(CLAIM_AMT, AGE, AUDIT_FLAG)
       DOUBLE PRECISION CLAIM_AMT
       INTEGER AGE
       INTEGER AUDIT_FLAG
       IF (CLAIM_AMT .GT. 10000.0) THEN
          AUDIT_FLAG = 1
       ELSE IF (AGE .GT. 65 .AND. CLAIM_AMT .GT. 5000.0) THEN
          AUDIT_FLAG = 1
       ELSE
          AUDIT_FLAG = 0
       ENDIF
       RETURN
       END

credit.title: Automated 70% of 2,500 SAS Modules
credit.desc: A major US credit firm needed to migrate legacy risk forecasting calculations off SAS. Using The Lifter platform, we parsed and verified code structures, migrating calculations safely to Snowflake.
credit.before: 2,500 undocumented legacy SAS calculations running on expensive local databases.
credit.after: Clean Python codebases running optimized Snowflake SQL queries.
credit.roi: 70% automated code migration, completed 8 months ahead of timeline.

healthcare.title: Medicare claims intake reduced delays by 70%
healthcare.desc: A national health insurance provider struggled with handwritten form digitization and record matching. Our Agentic NLP pipeline extracted key claim data and synced records securely.
healthcare.before: Manual entry queues taking 12 days to verify claimant details.
healthcare.after: AI pipelines analyzing claims instantly with 98% accuracy.
healthcare.roi: 70% claims backlog reduction, processing times compressed from days to hours.

wizardSteps.question: Submit details to receive your blueprint roadmap:

greetings: Hello! I am Indium's enterprise AI coordinator. Ask me about **The Lifter**, SAS migrations, or our iXie Gaming QA models.
Greetings! Ready to assess your digital architectures. What legacy modules or AI integrations are you working on?
lifter: The Lifter uses autonomous parser agents to read legacy codebases (like SAS, Fortran, PICK BASIC) and rewrite them to Python and Snowflake with 70% automation accuracy. Try it out in the sandbox section!
medicare: In our healthcare practice, we automated claims intake by building an NLP translation system. It resolved Medicare delays by 70% while verifying handwritten structures with 98% accuracy.
gaming: Our gaming division, iXie Gaming, delivers advanced game development, automated art checking, and specialized QA testing models to game studios worldwide.
default: Interesting challenge. Indium offers specialized data engineering (Databricks / Striim), Low-code platforms, and custom Agentic AI swarms. What specific integration details are you interested in?
